name: google-drive
description: Use Google Drive as the single entrypoint for Drive, Docs, Sheets, and Slides work.

interface.shortDescription: Work across Drive, Docs, Sheets, and Slides
interface.longDescription: Use Google Drive as one unified Google file plugin for search, file organization, sharing, and Google Docs, Google Sheets, and Google Slides workflows.
defaultPrompt: Find the right Drive file, then summarize a Doc, update a Sheet, or edit a Slides deck
